CVE-2026-63030.title: wp2shell — REST API batch-route confusion
CVE-2026-63030.role: Entry point of the chain. A route-confusion flaw in the REST batch endpoint lets an unauthenticated request reach an internal query path.

CVE-2026-60137.title: author__not_in WP_Query SQL injection
CVE-2026-60137.role: Second link. Unsanitised input in author__not_in reaches the database query; combined with CVE-2026-63030 this produces unauthenticated remote code execution.

evidence.detail: batch/v1 namespace is registered (REST batch endpoint reachable)

notes: Detected version falls inside a vulnerable range. Treat any internet-facing instance that ran this version as potentially compromised — patching closes the route but does not remove a backdoor planted beforehand.
